name: South of the Border Crepe Stack
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Tomato, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare crepes.
2. Heat ground beef, green pepper, refried beans, and taco sauce in a 10-inch skillet, stirring constantly until hot.
3. Place 1 crepe in an ungreased pie plate, 9 x 11/4 inches or 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
4. Spread with 1/3 of the beef mixture.
5. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup of the cheese.
6. Place another crepe on top.
7. Repeat steps 4 and 5 with remaining beef mixture, cheese, and crepes.
8. Cover pie plate with aluminum foil.
9. Bake for 10 minutes.
10. Remove foil and arrange tomato wedges in a circle about 1 inch from the edge.
11. Garnish with sour cream or guacamole, if desired.
12. Cut into wedges.
